stocks.impact_theory: Preliminary Q1 2026 revenue guidance of $56-57M far exceeded expectations due to record shipments and manufacturing output expansion. Economically, this signals robust demand for zinc-based battery storage amid global renewable energy transition and grid stability needs. Market psychology: FOMO buying as retail piles in on growth narrative, amplified by X sentiment hype. Historical parallels: Similar to Enphase Energy's 2020 surge on solar boom. Analogies: 1. Like a dam bursting with pent-up energy demand. 2. Rocket booster igniting after long countdown.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Strong prelim revenue beat (433% YoY implied growth), X posts bullish on shipments, web news highlights capacity expansion; sentiment shift from skepticism to optimism (min_faves high on positive posts).

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/long for 20% gains in 1-2 weeks on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High losses historically ($970M net loss), production delays, dilution risk.

stocks.justification: Direct company news with quantifiable revenue beat, confirmed across web/X, high volume supports.

stocks.impact_theory: Launched new ES9 luxury SUV after $9.5B investment, but stock erased gains amid China macro concerns (economic ceasefire fragility) and profit-taking post-19% surge. Implications: Highlights EV price wars, delivery growth vs profitability woes. Psychology: Disappointment despite product hype. Parallels: Tesla post-Cybertruck reveal dips. Analogies: 1. Fireworks fizzle in rain (China economy). 2. High jumper clearing bar but stumbling on landing.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Post-launch selloff despite positive product buzz; X mixed with profit-taking notes, web cites market uptick but NIO down 4.86%; broader EV sentiment cautious.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy for rebound if deliveries strong, +10%.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 8% downside on macro risks.

stocks.justification: Clear price action post-event, but macro noise reduces certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Hit new 52-week high but Portnoy Law Firm launched investigation (potential class action), signaling governance/execution issues. Implications: Satellite sector volatility amid LEO competition (Starlink). Psychology: Profit-taking at highs. Parallels: 2021 SPAC unwind phase. Analogies: 1. Satellite wobbling in orbit. 2. Climber reaching summit but rope fraying.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Investigation news overshadows new high; limited X buzz, web focuses on legal risks post-Q4 loss decline.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 12% drop on probe escalation.

stocks.justification: Legal probe concrete but outcome uncertain.

stocks.impact_theory: Premarket gainer +3.38% amid semis rotation; broader AI chip demand. Implications: Economic soft landing boosts capex. Psychology: Risk-on shift. Parallels: NVDA 2023 run-up. Analogies: 1. Wave rider catching semis tide. 2. Engine revving pre-race.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket leader in Benzinga scan; sector rotation from megacaps.

stocks.impact_theory: Premarket +3.23%, EV rotation despite China woes. Implications: Hybrid EV strength. Psychology: Value play vs pure EV. Parallels: BYD resilience. Analogies: 1. Hybrid bridge in EV winter. 2. Steady ship in stormy seas.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket gainer, benefits from NIO weakness spillover avoidance.
